tasks.description: Add CSS prompt template to MiniMax agent
tasks.context: Update src/agents/minimax/index.ts to include CSS-specific prompt template that enforces Tailwind-only rules, no custom CSS, semantic HTML standards. Add template selection logic based on file extension (.css, .tsx with styles).

tasks.description: Enforce 2-file maximum in MiniMax task execution
tasks.context: Update src/agents/minimax/index.ts task validation to reject tasks with >2 files in deliverables.code. Return clear error message to coordinator when limit exceeded. Prevents context overflow failures.

Update src/routes/x-admin.ts escalation listing endpoint to filter out spam patterns: generic test failures, timeout errors without context, duplicate messages. Add spam detection regex for common patterns identified in manual review.

tasks.description: Add spam flag column to escalations UI
tasks.context: Update src/routes/x-admin.ts escalation list view template to display spam flag indicator. Add CSS class for visual distinction. Shows filtered spam count vs real escalations needing CTO review.
